title: handle_google_response duplicates GoogleAdapter transform_response logic
description:
## Severity
Major
## Dimension
dry
## Location
src/pipeline.rs:396-504 vs src/providers/google.rs:164-258
## Violation
handle_google_response reimplements Gemini response parsing already present in GoogleAdapter::transform_response. The candidates/content/parts traversal, functionCall mapping, and usageMetadata extraction are duplicated. The two parsers will drift: adapter rejects no-candidates as InvalidResponse but pipeline silently returns empty text; adapter handles finishReason SAFETY, pipeline ignores it. Classic stovepipe — /v1 proxy goes through the adapter, the pipeline TUI does not.
## Mandated refactor
Pipeline should call GoogleAdapter::new().transform_response(...) and convert OpenAI-shaped tool_calls into ToolCall once. Or lift parsing into a streaming::parse_gemini_completion shared helper.
## Filed from QA review dispatch
